name: media-purge
description: Rule-based media cleanup utility for Plex on unraid — scan, recommend, and safely reclaim storage.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
